transcript.clean_text: on the eighth stage of the tour de france it would be wild fernand who again took a stage win finishing just ahead of tadepogacha who extended his lead via bonus seconds in the general classification for not winning for the second time at this tour bogata now leading the tour going into stage nine with 39 seconds of a gap on yonah's finger goal with garrett thomas the former winner in third swiss alps on day nine the final day before the first proper essay the end of the first week proper and the riders leaving egler home of the international cycling union for the first time in the history of the tour of france tom peacock looking after the white jersey of tarepogacha who of course was in the yellow the race would leave egler and head 186 kilometers onto the shores of lake geneva over a few climbs very famous from the tour de hormondi and back into france for the final eight kilometers a finish at chatel in utzavoir took a long long time for the breakaway to go when it did go well over 20 riders were in it including jonathan castro viejo bob jungles the likes of carlos verona recent winner at the dauphine luis leon sanchez four times a stage winner and what fanart decided to join them he brings aguirre with him for not taking the 20 points at the intermediate sprinter before the climbing in earnest truly began the fact that rigoberto ram was in there at just less than three and a half minutes from the yellow jersey meant that ua emirates would keep the gap in check inside final 65 kilometers and on the penultimate classified climb the cold it will be bob jungles who would attack zimon geska the german rider would go with him he'd take the king of the mountains points and get very close to the polka dot jersey temporarily moving into the lead in the competition but beyond the descent from the call de la croix the bob jungles would extend his gap magnus court having his last day in the king of the mountains jersey but with huge speeds at 90 kilometers per hour bob jungles taking the corners perfectly would really establish a lead into the final 20 kilometers and onto the final climb of the day not too much happening in the general classification group what bernard dropped taking some drinks back and tibu pino going off in search of a victory ten years and a few days after his first ever tour win which did come on swiss roads he'd be two minutes ahead of the yellow jersey group still a couple of riders in front of tada pogachar pino getting to within half a minute of the race leader bob yongles was stronger former monument winner liege pastor yesh a top 10 finisher on two occasions at the gyroed italia years though without a proper win and some health problems behind him he was on his way back castro viejona the two spaniards would set off in pursuit behind they'd still be at 25 seconds from pino who were 10 kilometers remaining and going back into his native france would still have a chance of taking a big stage win the final descent over for castro viejo in at almost three quarters of a minute it was looking unlikely they were going to catch jungles pinot still had a chance however but jungles was looking strong to the end half a kilometer of a lead on tibo pinot and jungles heading into the home region of the team that pays his wages and jungles about to bring it home the face of vancon lavenue the team boss with his head out the window and ready to celebrate for peanut would all unravel in the last couple of kilometers and bob jungles back where he belonged winning a stage of the tour de france a first tour win in his career a second in grand tours getting close to his first grand tour when he'd finished second madonna coming in third and today pagacha stealing a handful of seconds on can write thomas adam yates and the rest vinegar able to keep pace with him all the headlines all the glory though and another rapid fast stay in the heat in france bob jungles winning as they move from switzerland back into france and beating jonathan castro carlos the yellow jersey the two-time defending champion still in control no extension of the lead over vingal but three more seconds over thomas and the rest thomas and yates in third and fourth godu the best frenchman in fifth with roman balder just a second behind enrique master the best spaniard in eighth when the race resumes after the rest day it will leave marzin and head to mejev just under 150 kilometers the first alpine stage entirely on french territory not the most difficult but an uphill finish at the altipo in mezhev another big day and you better watch it live and on demand on gcn plus i
